summary: Successfully extended Vapi DuckDB schema with question tracking tables and implemented LLM-based question extraction pipeline with prefab answer generation
learnings: Question extraction uses /zo/ask with structured output_format for reliable JSON parsing
Fire-and-forget pattern prevents call saving from being blocked by AI processing
Database operations use Python subprocess pattern to avoid SQL injection
DuckDB schema migration script is idempotent using IF NOT EXISTS clauses
Prefab answer generation triggers automatically at 3+ question occurrences
